query: SELECT Global_Key__c, DurableId, QualifiedApiName, InternalSharingModel, ExternalSharingModel FROM EntityDefinition WHERE IsCustomizable = true
query_v1: SELECT DurableId, QualifiedApiName, InternalSharingModel, ExternalSharingModel FROM EntityDefinition WHERE IsCustomizable = true
description: Identifies sharing model settings for all customizable objects to detect overly permissive configurations

query: SELECT Global_Key__c, Id, Name, Type FROM Group WHERE Type = 'Organization' LIMIT 1
query_v1: SELECT Id, Name, Type FROM Group WHERE Type = 'Organization' LIMIT 1
description: Retrieves organization-wide default settings to review baseline sharing rules

query: SELECT Global_Key__c, Id, Name, Label, IsOwnedByProfile, PermissionsModifyAllData, PermissionsViewAllData, PermissionsManageUsers FROM PermissionSet WHERE IsOwnedByProfile = false
query_v1: SELECT Id, Name, Label, IsOwnedByProfile, PermissionsModifyAllData, PermissionsViewAllData, PermissionsManageUsers FROM PermissionSet WHERE IsOwnedByProfile = false
description: Lists all custom permission sets including those with elevated system permissions like Modify All Data and View All Data

query: SELECT Global_Key__c, ParentId, Field, PermissionsEdit, PermissionsRead, SobjectType FROM FieldPermissions WHERE PermissionsEdit = true AND SobjectType IN ('User','Profile','PermissionSet')
query_v1: SELECT ParentId, Field, PermissionsEdit, PermissionsRead, SobjectType FROM FieldPermissions WHERE PermissionsEdit = true AND SobjectType IN ('User','Profile','PermissionSet')
description: Identifies field-level edit permissions on sensitive security objects (User, Profile, PermissionSet) that could enable privilege escalation

query: SELECT Global_Key__c, Id, Name, UserLicense.Name, PermissionsModifyAllData, PermissionsViewAllData, PermissionsManageUsers, PermissionsApiEnabled FROM Profile WHERE UserType = 'Standard'
query_v1: SELECT Id, Name, UserLicense.Name, PermissionsModifyAllData, PermissionsViewAllData, PermissionsManageUsers, PermissionsApiEnabled FROM Profile WHERE UserType = 'Standard'
description: Lists all standard user profiles with their system-level permissions to identify overly privileged profiles

query: SELECT Global_Key__c, Id, Username, Email, ProfileId, IsActive, LastLoginDate, CreatedDate, FederationIdentifier FROM User WHERE IsActive = true AND LastLoginDate < LAST_N_DAYS:90
query_v1: SELECT Id, Username, Email, ProfileId, IsActive, LastLoginDate, CreatedDate, FederationIdentifier FROM User WHERE IsActive = true AND LastLoginDate < LAST_N_DAYS:90
description: Identifies active users who haven't logged in for 90+ days, indicating potential stale accounts that should be deactivated

query: SELECT Global_Key__c, Id, PermissionSetId, AssigneeId, PermissionSet.Name, Assignee.Username FROM PermissionSetAssignment WHERE PermissionSet.PermissionsModifyAllData = true OR PermissionSet.PermissionsViewAllData = true
query_v1: SELECT Id, PermissionSetId, AssigneeId, PermissionSet.Name, Assignee.Username FROM PermissionSetAssignment WHERE PermissionSet.PermissionsModifyAllData = true OR PermissionSet.PermissionsViewAllData = true
description: Tracks users assigned permission sets with Modify All Data or View All Data permissions for privilege monitoring

query: SELECT Global_Key__c, Id, UserId, LoginTime, Status, SourceIp, Application FROM LoginHistory WHERE LoginTime = LAST_N_DAYS:30  ORDER BY LoginTime DESC LIMIT 10000
query_v1: SELECT Id, UserId, LoginTime, Status, SourceIp, Application FROM LoginHistory WHERE LoginTime = LAST_N_DAYS:30  ORDER BY LoginTime DESC LIMIT 10000
description: Captures all login attempts from the last 30 days to detect potential brute force attacks or unauthorized access attempts

query: SELECT Global_Key__c, Id, Action, Section,Display,DelegateUser,ResponsibleNamespacePrefix,CreatedbyContext,CreatedByIssuer, CreatedById, CreatedBy.Username, CreatedDate FROM SetupAuditTrail WHERE CreatedDate = LAST_N_DAYS:90 ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC
query_v1: SELECT Id, Action, Section,Display,DelegateUser,ResponsibleNamespacePrefix,CreatedbyContext,CreatedByIssuer, CreatedById, CreatedBy.Username, CreatedDate FROM SetupAuditTrail WHERE CreatedDate = LAST_N_DAYS:90 ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC
description: Monitors all configuration changes in the last 90 days to track security-related modifications and user management activities

query: SELECT Global_Key__c, ParentId, SobjectType, PermissionsCreate, PermissionsRead, PermissionsEdit, PermissionsDelete, PermissionsViewAllRecords, PermissionsModifyAllRecords FROM ObjectPermissions WHERE PermissionsModifyAllRecords = true
query_v1: SELECT ParentId, SobjectType, PermissionsCreate, PermissionsRead, PermissionsEdit, PermissionsDelete, PermissionsViewAllRecords, PermissionsModifyAllRecords FROM ObjectPermissions WHERE PermissionsModifyAllRecords = true
description: Identifies profiles and permission sets with Modify All Records permission which bypasses sharing rules

query: SELECT Global_Key__c, Id, Name, ParentRoleId FROM UserRole
query_v1: SELECT Id, Name, ParentRoleId FROM UserRole
description: Maps the role hierarchy to understand data visibility through role-based sharing

query: SELECT Global_Key__c, Id, Username, Email, ProfileId, Profile.Name, UserRoleId, IsActive FROM User WHERE Profile.PermissionsModifyAllData = true OR Profile.PermissionsViewAllData = true
query_v1: SELECT Id, Username, Email, ProfileId, Profile.Name, UserRoleId, IsActive FROM User WHERE Profile.PermissionsModifyAllData = true OR Profile.PermissionsViewAllData = true
description: Lists all users with elevated system permissions (Modify All Data or View All Data) for privileged access review

query: SELECT Global_Key__c, Id, NetworkId, ParentId FROM NetworkMemberGroup
query_v1: SELECT Id, NetworkId, ParentId FROM NetworkMemberGroup
description: Reviews Experience Cloud community member groups for proper external user access controls

query: SELECT Global_Key__c, Id, UsersId, LoginType, SourceIp, LastModifiedDate FROM AuthSession WHERE LastModifiedDate = LAST_N_DAYS:7
query_v1: SELECT Id, UsersId, LoginType, SourceIp, LastModifiedDate FROM AuthSession WHERE LastModifiedDate = LAST_N_DAYS:7
description: Monitors active authentication sessions from the last 7 days to detect suspicious login patterns or session anomalies

query: SELECT Global_Key__c, Id, Name, Username, Email, Profile.Name, IsActive FROM User WHERE IsActive = true AND Profile.Name = 'System Administrator'
query_v1: SELECT Id, Name, Username, Email, Profile.Name, IsActive FROM User WHERE IsActive = true AND Profile.Name = 'System Administrator'
description: Lists all active users assigned the System Administrator profile
